user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new external trainer, so that outside trainers can be assigned to training topics
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Manage External Trainers screen; When I click Add new external trainer and provide name, company, email and skill; Then the trainer is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view external trainers with their name, company, email, skill and trainings conducted, so that I can assess trainer suitability
acceptance_criteria: Given external trainers exist; When I open the Manage External Trainers screen; Then I see each trainer's Name, Company name, Email, Skill / Technology and Trainings conducted

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing external trainer, so that I can keep their contact and skill details current
acceptance_criteria: Given a trainer is listed; When I click Edit and update their details; Then the changes are saved and reflected in the list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the external trainers list, so that I see the most recent trainer records
acceptance_criteria: Given trainers have been added or edited; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current records

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to proceed to the next step with Next, so that I can continue configuring learning management
acceptance_criteria: Given I have finished managing external trainers; When I click Next; Then I move to the next configuration step
